long_desc: Owner of Necronomicon Manuscript, Your Master
detailed_desc:
Those who fight for an ideal is the most fool, the fool of the fools, they
want the world to became such a peacefull place, THEY NEVER GOING TO THIS
TARGET" Destruction is the end of the world, any other think is an illusion,
Necronomicon will save us...  Stay with me...  Became a NECROMANCER, and
destroy these FOOLS HUMAN BEINGS !!!!
